title: Application exception investigation
steps: Inspect matching error logs in Loki.
Open the related trace in Tempo.
Compare with recent deploy or config changes.

title: Dependency latency investigation
steps: Compare dependency latency with request error rate.

title: Cache saturation and lock contention
steps: Check Redis command latency and hot key distribution.
Inspect lock wait spans and cache pool saturation.
Compare cache queue depth with checkout and cart error rate.

title: Database connection pool exhaustion
steps: Inspect slow SQL spans and queue wait time.
Compare pool exhaustion with service thread saturation.

title: Payment gateway timeout investigation
steps: Check payment gateway health and timeout rate.
Compare gateway latency with payment retry volume.

title: Deploy and configuration change correlation
steps: Find deploy and configuration changes in the incident window.
Compare the first bad signal with release timestamps.
Prepare a manual rollback or feature flag disablement plan.
